strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
Diverse experience across various technologies and industries
concerns: No direct mention of a Master's degree or PhD in an AI-related field
Limited experience in directly advising strategic customers or partners on AI technologies
Lack of explicit focus on cloud technologies in the resume

key_factors.factor: Experience in AI and related infrastructure

response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development and has worked on AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct experience in advising on AI technologies and has no mentioned advanced degree in AI.
